parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the chorus/vibrato. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the modulation.
parameters-en.Mode: Selects the type of modulation--Chorus or Vibrato.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the overall tonal balance of the modulation.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no modulation is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
